creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
swills      2010-12-31 03:36:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-themes           Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-themes/cursor-neutral-white-theme Makefile distinfo 
                                          pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Cursor theme based on Neutral (and jaguarx) theme,
  which changes all black cursors to white.
  
  WWW: http://gnome-look.org/content/show.php/Neutral%2B%2B+White?content=108143
  
  PR:             ports/152719
  Submitted by:   Grzegorz Blach <magik at roorback.net>
  Approved by:    wxs (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.248     +1 -0      ports/x11-themes/Makefile
